'''bapogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmofragility|osmofragility]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmofragility|osmofragility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bapogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæpegeth|bæpegeth]] || [[word:bæpegej|bæpegej]] || [[word:bæpegesh|bæpegesh]] || [[word:bæpege|bæpege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bapopogoth|bapopogoth]] || [[word:bapopogoj|bapopogoj]] || [[word:bapopogosh|bapopogosh]] || [[word:bapopogo|bapopogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bapogoth|bapogoth]] || [[word:bapogoj|bapogoj]] || [[word:bapogosh|bapogosh]] || [[word:bapogo|bapogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bapofgoth|bapofgoth]] || [[word:bapofgoj|bapofgoj]] || [[word:bapofgosh|bapofgosh]] || [[word:bapofgof|bapofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bapogotho|bapogotho]] || [[word:bapogojo|bapogojo]] || [[word:bapogosho|bapogosho]] || [[word:bapogoko|bapogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bapogoth|bapogoth]] || [[word:bapogoj|bapogoj]] || [[word:bapogosh|bapogosh]] || [[word:bapogo|bapogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bapogothol|bapogothol]] || [[word:bapogojol|bapogojol]] || [[word:bapogoshol|bapogoshol]] || [[word:bapogokol|bapogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bapogothotho|bapogothotho]] || [[word:bapogojojo|bapogojojo]] || [[word:bapogoshosho|bapogoshosho]] || [[word:bapogoko|bapogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bapogothon|bapogothon]] || [[word:bapogojon|bapogojon]] || [[word:bapogoshon|bapogoshon]] || [[word:bapogokon|bapogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bapogothoro|bapogothoro]] || [[word:bapogojoro|bapogojoro]] || [[word:bapogoshoro|bapogoshoro]] || [[word:bapogokoro|bapogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
